description_long: This is a modern, single-story house with a flat roof and a minimalist rectangular layout. The structure is surrounded by a low wall and features a combination of white and light gray exterior surfaces. The property includes a driveway, a small front yard with trees and shrubs, and a rear garden area. Large windows and glass doors are distributed asymmetrically along the facade, allowing for ample natural light. The main entryway is recessed and features a simple, clean-lined door with no porch or overhang. The overall design emphasizes open outdoor spaces and a seamless connection between indoor and outdoor living areas.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, white facade, large windows, and landscaped front and rear yards.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, driveway, and landscaped front yard with trees and shrubs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the flat roof, long exterior wall, and rear garden area with additional greenery.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back garden, secondary entry, and more asymmetrical window placement.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the driveway, side wall, and a small outbuilding or garage structure.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large glass panels
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed main door with no porch or overhang, minimalistic and flush with the facade
